sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Shielded Stride
feat.text: When your shield is up, your enemies’ blows can’t touch you. When you have your shield raised, you can Stride to move half your Speed without triggering reactions that are triggered by your movement (such as Reactive Strikes). You can use Shielded Stride while Flying or Swimming instead of Striding if you have the corresponding movement type.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

archetype.name: Bastion
archetype.note: This archetype offers Shielded Stride at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Viking
archetype.note: This archetype offers Shielded Stride at a different level than displayed here.
